frame.name: The Registry
frame.domain: artifacts of the ecosystem itself: extensions, skins, components, clients, and communities
frame.purpose: a browsable community of artifacts typed by contracts and graded by conformance, self-hosting the ecosystem's own evolution machinery, expressible from inside the app by anyone, this app's own client entry included, graded by the identical pair, with no privileged placement

sources.description: this deployment's own conformance oracles (build/check-extension-seam.mjs's ranking-separation fuzz, build/check-skins.mjs's per-skin assertions, and other sandbox-executable checks), re-run directly against the artifact each artifact-card claim names

a conformance oracle that only executes in this repository's own CI (build/check-conformance-read.mjs and build/check-conformance-write.mjs, the independent-minimal-client pair), cited as recomputable in the repository, never as app-verified

contribution_target: https://github.com/A-Viable-Fork/Knowledge-Game/tree/main/communities/the-registry (in-repo for now; a pull request touching this path re-runs the gate via .github/workflows/ci.yml; a documented move-out obligation to a standalone sibling repository is ledgered, exactly as epistack-competition's own SK-21 is)
